error_signature: File can't be read if brackets contain symbols
title: Read File Node fails with special characters in folder name
symptom: The read file node cannot locate files in folders with square brackets containing symbols like '+' or '-'. Removing the symbols allows the file to be read.
applies_when: Folder name contains square brackets with symbols
not_this_if: Folder name does not contain symbols
root_cause: The read file node has issues interpreting folder names with special characters, specifically square brackets containing symbols. This can lead to incorrect file paths being generated, causing the node to fail in locating the specified files.
fix_steps: Modify the file path to escape the square brackets by adding a backslash before each bracket.
agent_instruction: Escape the square brackets in the folder name by adding backslashes before them.
